meaning: n.默西塞德郡(英国英格兰郡名)
examples: Up to 300 workers are facing the axe at a struggling Merseyside firm.
The first ship to have arrived on Merseyside from China docked in 1834.
Dave Hanratty, chair of Merseyside Fire and Rescue Authority, said the cuts will affect frontline services.
Sarah Milner, secretary of the Merseyside branch of the MND Association lost her brother to MND.
